accepted_findings.message_regex: This path depends on a .*user-provided value
accepted_findings.reason: Paths are guarded by validation and boundary checks (PathConfig, resolveSafePath, sanitizePlatformSegment). Findings are static-analysis false positives.
Routes are protected by explicit login/file/parsing rate-limit middleware and auth middleware; scanner may miss middleware chaining.
CSP disabled only in development mode for tooling compatibility; production branch enables CSP.
Outbound hosts are hardcoded vendor APIs; user input affects only resource IDs, not host/protocol.
Utility functions are best-effort text conversion helpers, not trust-boundary sanitizers at executable sinks.

accepted_findings.message_regex: regular expression does not match script end tags
accepted_findings.reason: Regex is used for formatting cleanup in preview/text helpers, not as a complete security sanitizer.
Findings are in content transformation/preview helper paths, not at a primary untrusted DOM or script execution sink.
Matched text is platform metadata identifier, not a credential, token, or client secret.
